<!-- One or two sentences. What problem does this solve or what does this add? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New component
- [ ] Fix to an existing component
- [ ] CLI change (new command, flag, or bug fix)
- [ ] Theme system change
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore / tooling / CI
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Screenshots / recording

<!--
Required for any visual or component change.
Show before/after, or the new component on both iOS and Android if behavior differs.
Drag and drop images/videos directly into this PR description.
-->

## Does this introduce a new dependency?

- [ ] No new dependencies
- [ ] Yes — and I have maintainer sign-off (link the issue/comment where this was approved)
- [ ] Yes — and I have NOT gotten sign-off yet (expect this PR to be paused until that happens)

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My component uses `StyleSheet.create()` only — no Tailwind, NativeWind, or CSS-in-JS
- [ ] All colors/spacing/radius values pull from `lib/theme.ts` tokens, nothing hardcoded
- [ ] I updated `registry/registry.json` if this adds or changes a component's files/dependencies
- [ ] I added or updated the example in `apps/example/`
- [ ] I added or updated docs in `docs/components/` (if applicable)
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run test` passes
- [ ] I tested on iOS
- [ ] I tested on Android
- [ ] I tested with both light and dark theme

## Anything else reviewers should know?

<!-- Edge cases, known limitations, design decisions you went back and forth on, etc. -->
